title: solidago puberula subsp. pulverulenta
intro: Solidago puberula subsp. pulverulenta, also known as Powdered Dwarf Goldenrod, is a subspecies of Solidago puberula, a perennial herbaceous plant native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Powdered Dwarf Goldenrod include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system and reduce inflammation. Powdered Dwarf Goldenrod can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal medicine to create salves, ointments, and creams for topical application.
